title: Phase 1: Physical & Link Layer
description: Transmit and receive authenticated frames over LoRa. Exit criteria: two nodes exchange authenticated frames, replay attack blocked, test vectors for link layer.
notes: Two-node authenticated frame exchange test complete (two_node_frame_exchange): Node A signs, Node B verifies full wire-format frame, tampered payload/wrong pubkey/truncated payload all rejected, replay blocked by ReplayWindow. sign_frame/verify_frame helpers in schnorr.rs. Remaining: test vector export for link layer (ijj).
close_reason: Two-node authenticated frame exchange implemented and tested: sign_frame/verify_frame in schnorr.rs, replay detection via ReplayWindow, full wire-format round-trip in two_node_frame_exchange test. All 18 Rust tests passing.
